technologies.title: Podman/Docker
technologies.content: Using Docker and Podman since 2018 for isolated, reproducible dev environments; Podman is my default.

technologies.title: GNU/Linux
technologies.content: I used Ubuntu for several years before switching to Fedora, which I now use daily. Linux is where I do most of my development, scripting, and system automation.

technologies.title: Networking
technologies.content: Since 2025, I’ve been learning networking, focusing on how client–server traffic, performance, and basic security work in practice.
